channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anthropic CEO Revises AI Job Displacement Concerns
item.description: Amodei suggests Jevons Paradox, where technology boosts demand and employment, may apply to artificial intelligence.

item.title: America 250 Chair: Charitable giving decline, a potential shift on July 4th
item.description: With the U.S. marking its 250th anniversary, a proposal aims to reverse declining charitable giving and establish an annual tradition.

item.title: White House projects $529 billion in savings from Trump's drug pricing agreement
item.description: President Trump stated the deal would result in lower drug prices, claiming it offers 'the lowest drug prices anywhere in the world.'

item.title: Next CDC director's potential impact on U.S. healthcare
item.description: The upcoming CDC director may affect vaccine policy, hospital care, disease monitoring and public confidence in healthcare.
